title: Add UUID per-process state files for parallel workers
description: Each beads-loop process should generate a UUID at startup and write it into a per-process state file (.beads-loop-state-<uuid>.json). This replaces the single shared .beads-loop-state.json so multiple parallel workers don't overwrite each other's state. All state helpers (loadState, saveState, touchState, clearState) must be updated to use the UUID-based path. Writes must be atomic (write-to-tmp then rename) to prevent IO corruption.

title: Release stale beads back to open when owning process dies
description: When a .beads-loop-state-*.json file is found with LastUpdated older than staleTimeout (process died, was killed, or stopped), the loop must call 'bd update <id> --status=open' to release the bead before deleting the stale state file. This ensures orphaned in_progress beads become available again. Add cleanStalePeerFiles() that releases and removes stale peer state files, called on startup and inside clearState().

title: Peer-aware work selection: skip beads claimed by live workers
description: Update findWork() to scan all peer .beads-loop-state-*.json files before picking a bead. Beads claimed by peers with a fresh LastUpdated (within staleTimeout) should be skipped, so parallel workers don't race to claim the same bead. Also add getPeerClaimedBeads() helper.

title: Commit beads-loop initial implementation
description: Commit the Go source files (main.go, go.mod, Makefile) and the built binary for the beads-loop autonomous agent tool.
